temporal_description:
(00:00-00:01) A close-up shot shows a computer monitor displaying a blue interface. On the left, a grid map of a city is visible. In the center, a window with Chinese characters reads '有内鬼, 結束交易' (There's a mole, end transaction). Below this, a text box contains the message 'SEND MESSAGE ALL GSM900'. (Storyline: The scene opens on a computer screen, immediately establishing a high-stakes situation. The message about a mole and the instruction to send a message to all GSM900 devices suggests a coordinated, possibly malicious, action is being initiated.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: N/A. 2) Background sounds or music: A low, ominous electronic hum and a distinct 'ding' sound effect when the message is displayed.)
(00:02-00:05) The screen transitions to a different interface, showing a map of a city with glowing blue lines indicating cell tower coverage. A text box at the bottom reads 'DETECT GSM900 52 SELECT CELL'. The map is overlaid with a scrolling list of phone numbers. (Storyline: This segment reveals the technical nature of the operation. The system is actively scanning for and selecting specific GSM cells, indicating a targeted attack or surveillance operation is underway.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: N/A. 2) Background sounds or music: A low, tense electronic score continues, with a series of rapid, high-pitched beeps and clicks as the system processes data.)
